original_message: I ordered a laptop from your website two weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived! The tracking page hasn't updated in 5 days and no one from support has responded to my emails. This is absolutely unacceptable — I need answers NOW!

original_message: Hi, I'd like to return a jacket I purchased last week. Unfortunately it doesn't fit correctly and the colour looks different from the photos online. Could you please guide me through the return process and confirm I'll receive a full refund?
auto_reply: We're sorry to hear the jacket didn't meet your expectations. Please visit our Returns page for detailed instructions on how to process your return. Once we receive the item in its original condition, we will issue a full refund to your original payment method.
